specific_mechanism: Bruhat-Tits geodesic cascade with new apartment parameters and new learnable cascade module (new module; regen attempt 2)
llm_application: Bruhat-Tits geodesic cascade: introduce a NEW learnable module with its own parameters (new apartment parameters) implementing Bruhat-Tits geodesic cascade; module adds new learnable cascade module and new geodesic pathway, creating new architectural-topology change distinct from baseline; module's parameters are not derivable from existing weights
